case_title: LAURA ROGERS-CARDARELLI VS. ZACHARY SHEA ZENTNER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROGERS-CARDARELLI, LAURA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZENTNER, ZACHARY SHEA $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,200.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $10,000 IN UNPAID RENT FROM MARCH 2018 THROUGH SEPTEMBER 2018 TO THE COURT'S JURISDICTIONAL LIMIT.
